assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud commands with weekend-only schedules (Saturday 2AM-6AM, Saturday 6AM-10AM, Sunday 2AM-6AM) using FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA/SU

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Shows exact gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence parameters configured for weekly weekend schedules

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides specific exclusion configurations for Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 code freezes, each lasting about 21 days (within the 30-day limit)

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Includes specific SOX audit exclusion for November 1-30 with 'no_upgrades' scope and provides the complete gcloud command

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Explicitly states '30 days max' in the maintenance exclusion types table and shows the duration for 'No upgrades' exclusions

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Does not mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows or that maintenance windows only apply to auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Regular or Stable channels for SOX compliance and mentions Extended channel option, with specific gcloud command to set release channel

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope parameters

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, though it does mention version EoS (End of Service)
